plugin.name: Wi-Fi Profiles
plugin.description: Inspect saved Wi-Fi profiles, current network details, and any locally available stored passwords.
title: Wi-Fi Profiles
subtitle: Review the current Wi-Fi connection, saved network profiles, and passwords that your platform backend can expose.
unsupported: No current Wi-Fi network is connected.
status_empty: No Wi-Fi profiles were returned by the current backend.
error.no_password.title: No Password
error.no_password.body: No stored password is available for this profile.
log.linux: Reading active Linux Wi-Fi connections with nmcli.
log.windows: Exporting Windows Wi-Fi profiles with clear keys.
error.nmcli: NetworkManager CLI (`nmcli`) is not available on this system.
error.netsh: `netsh` is not available on this Windows system.
error.saved_profiles: Unable to read saved Wi-Fi profiles via nmcli.
error.macos_device: Unable to determine the active Wi-Fi interface on macOS.
error.macos_list: Unable to list preferred wireless networks.
warning.windows: Windows current-network fields are best-effort and may vary with localized netsh output.
